# Grape

## Tags
fruit, wine, food

## Categories
food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/grape)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Grape;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Grape { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
